selected_tasks.body_preview: - Day 127 03:30 session landed `append_terminal_state_events.py` (+77 lines) and its test file (+137 lines) to retroactively append FailureObserved events for error-completed runs. This fixed the lifecycle gap where crashed runs never got a closing event. - `is_input_validation_completion()` exists at summarize_state_gnomes.py:464 — it detects RunCompleted(e
